name: Gokurakuyu Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Gokurakuyu Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates, manages, and franchises hot bath facilities and spas under the Gokurakuyu and RAKU SPA name in Japan. As of January 29, 2021, it operated 53 stores, including 29 directly operated stores, 13 FC shop stores, and 2 group stores in Japan, as well as 3 directly managed stores and 6 FC stores internationally. The company was formerly known as Gokurakuyu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gokurakuyu Holdings Co., Ltd. in January 2017. Gokurakuyu Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
